title: Delicate Slovakian Coconut Curry
description: A fresh spring dish with unsweetened coconut milk, light spices, and a tadka for a gentle, Ayurvedic-friendly curry.

ingredients.name: green chili
ingredients.notes: optional, for a hint of heat

instructions: Heat a small pot over medium heat and pour in 1 tbsp oil.
Add 1 tsp mustard seeds and 1 tsp fenugreek seeds, letting them sputter for 30 seconds.
Stir in finely chopped onion, garlic, and ginger, cooking until onion is translucent.
Sprinkle 1 tsp curry powder over the mixture, sautéing for 1 minute to release aromas.
Add diced carrots, bell pepper, and peas, stirring to coat with spices.
Pour in 200 ml vegetable broth and 200 ml unsweetened coconut milk, bringing to a gentle simmer.
Season with salt to taste and cook for 8 minutes, allowing vegetables to soften.
Stir in a squeeze of lemon juice and a pinch of fresh cilantro, adjusting seasoning.
Remove from heat and transfer to serving bowls, garnishing with extra cilantro if desired.
Serve warm as a light spring dish, optionally accompanied by steamed rice.
